mapper.sql: b.id, b.batch_no, b.template_id, t.name AS template_name, b.redeem_rule_type, b.validity_type, b.fixed_effective_time, b.fixed_expire_time, b.relative_valid_days, b.status, b.generate_count, b.success_use_count, b.remark, b.create_by, b.create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM coupon_activation_batch b LEFT JOIN coupon_template t ON t.id = b.template_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE b.id = #{batchId} AND b.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_activation_batch SET success_use_count = success_use_count + 1, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{batchId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
